default_environment_id.description: Environment ID used when the pose is outside all degenerate_area polygons, or when map is not ready

default_longitudinal_scale_factor.description: Longitudinal velocity scale factor applied only inside a degenerate_area polygon that has no per-polygon map attribute. Outside all polygons (or before the map is ready), no scaling is applied. Applied as v_out = v_in * factor

map_longitudinal_scale_factor_attribute.description: Lanelet2 polygon attribute name for per-area longitudinal scale factor override

environment_id.description: Environment ID assigned to Lanelet2 polygons with matching subtype attribute

^environment_[0-9]+_output_pose_covarian.description: 6x6 pose covariance (row-major, 36 elements) in body frame for the specified environment ID
